requirements.section: 13 Painting: Filling, Stroking and Marker Symbols
requirements.assertion: The initial value of the paint-order property paints fill first, then stroke, then markers.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Covered by the Donner-authored SVG2 extension case donner-svg2/painting/paint-order/default-fill-then-stroke, which isolates this requirement (default paint order (fill then stroke)) against a manually-constructed exact geometric reference; the Donner adapter renders it to a byte-exact match (donner_svg2_suite). Reference provenance and an independent oracle review are recorded with the extension corpus.

requirements.section: 13 Painting: Filling, Stroking and Marker Symbols
requirements.assertion: paint-order accepts fill, stroke, and markers in any order; keywords omitted from the list are painted in their default order after the listed keywords.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Worked-example seed record. Ordering permutations need dedicated cases in the extension corpus.

requirements.section: 13 Painting: Filling, Stroking and Marker Symbols
requirements.assertion: Applying paint-order to text does not change glyph shaping, so a paint-only tspan must not split shaping across its boundary.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Worked-example seed record matching the manifest sample in design 0057. A candidate test id is recorded but the reference image and coverage edge land with the extension corpus in a later milestone, so this stays a gap.
